title: Moone Boy
overview: Martin Moone is a young boy who relies on the help of his imaginary friend Sean to deal with the quandaries of life in a wacky small-town Irish family in the 1980's.
creator: Chris O'Dowd

episodes.title: Men of the Houses
episodes.overview: In Boyle, Ireland in 1989, Martin Moone has made a somewhat unusual friend.

videoFile.name: Moone Boy - S01E01 - Men of the Houses.mp4

episodes.downloadURL: https://archive.org/download/moone-boy-s01E01-men-of-the-houses/Moone Boy - S01E01 - Men of the Houses.mp4

episodes.title: Bunch of Marys
episodes.overview: Martin befriends new boy Trevor in order to dine on his family's regular gourmet meals while Debra is too distracted with political campaigning to feed her youngest child. Ma Moone and her friends hope to incite girl power in the local area by canvassing for politician Mary Robinson, but they're less than thrilled when they're forced to turn to fishy rich man Francie Feeley for funding.

videoFile.name: Moone Boy - S01E02 - Bunch of Marys.mp4

episodes.title: Another Prick in the Wall
episodes.overview: Using the battle for the bathroom as an opportunity to catch extra zeds, Martin falls foul of Sinead's pranks when she covers him in make-up while he's asleep. Unable to get to a mirror, Martin heads off to school unaware of his Boy George-esque look...

videoFile.name: Moone Boy - S01E03 - Another Prick in the Wall.mp4

episodes.title: Dark Side of the Moone
episodes.overview: Uncle Danny arrives just in time for Martin's birds-and-the-bees talk with Mum and Dad. Sean seeks solace with other imaginary friends when Martin upsets him.

episodes.title: Godfellas
episodes.overview: Fidelma joins the church choir while Martin's confirmation service leads to an epiphany.

episodes.title: The Bell-End of an Era
episodes.overview: It's Martin's final week at primary school and he wants to leave a mark. Fidelma manages to drop a bombshell.

episodes.title: Boylé, Boylé, Boylé
episodes.overview: Martin is appalled when his dad takes the family on holiday during the 1990 World Cup, so he tries to hitch-hike back to Boyle to watch a vital match on home turf.

videoFile.name: Moone Boy - S02E01 - Boylé, Boylé, Boylé.mp4

episodes.title: Moone Dance
episodes.overview: Martin is about to start secondary school, and with this new era comes attending his first school disco.

episodes.title: Ghost Raft
episodes.overview: Martin and Padraic leave on a voyage of a lifetime on their Halloween ghost ship, but things soon take an unexpected spooky turn.

episodes.title: Handball Duel
episodes.overview: Like all young lads in the early 90s, Martin wants needs a Sega Mega Drive. Be gone slinky, hello magic machine. But Liam is having none of it: not only is this whole computer thing just a fad, work is slow and money is tight.

episodes.title: Stags and Hens
episodes.overview: Could love be in the air when Martin's new classmate and neighbour Majella catches his eye? Father Linehan plans a memorable stag do for Dessie.

videoFile.name: Moone Boy - S02E05 - Stags and Hens.mp4

episodes.title: The Boyle Wedding
episodes.overview: Celebration is in the air as St Patrick's Day dawns, but the Moones are having a different kind of party today: Fidelma's wedding.

videoFile.name: Moone Boy - S02E06 - The Boyle Wedding.mp4

episodes.title: Where the Streets Do Have Names
episodes.overview: Martin and Padraic travel to Dublin whilst Liam runs into a former flame.

episodes.overview: Fed up with being caught between two warring parents, Padraic disappears with Martin. Crunchie Haystacks finds it hard to cope.

episodes.title: Fecks, Lies and Videotape

episodes.overview: After crop circles appear in Boyle, Martin attracts media attention when he claims his donkey has been abducted by aliens.

episodes.title: Bells 'n' Smells
episodes.overview: Dessie works on a new business venture as he plans to open Boyle's first Catholic book shop. Martin, meanwhile, embarks on a building project.

episodes.title: Gershwin's Bucket List
episodes.overview: Martin and Sean discover Grandad also has an imaginary friend.
